name: get_pa_latency_window
description: Return current prior-authorization latency window from kqldb_payer_rt (auth_lifecycle table). Reads the same 15-minute bin shape NB_RTI_02 publishes. Returns p50/p90/p99 latency, breach counts, and the breach_rate the pa_denial_rate_spike Activator rule fires on. Never returns member identifiers.

is_expedited.description: Filter to expedited (72h SLA) when true, standard (168h) when false, all when omitted.

name: get_emergency_admit_worklist
description: Return current emergency-admit ADT worklist from kqldb_payer_rt (adt_admissions table). Reads the leftanti-join shape NB_RTI_03 publishes (admits without a member_outreach within 24h). Returns priority bucket (high/standard), facility_id, and outreach_status. PHI-minimized: returns member_hash only.

name: get_siu_suspect_claims
description: Return current SIU suspect claims from kqldb_payer_rt (claim_arrivals table). Reads the score-aggregation shape NB_RTI_04 publishes. Returns claim_id, intake_score, score_reasons list, payer_id, provider_id. Triggers a downstream SIU work item if intake_score >= the configured threshold (default 0.6).

name: ask_um_agent
description: Delegate a deeper UM analytics question to the UMAgent Fabric data agent. Used when the operator needs context beyond the current RTI window (e.g., 30-day PA TAT trend, peer-to-peer overturn rate). Never used to make case-level decisions.

name: ask_care_mgmt_agent
description: Delegate a deeper CareMgmt question to the CareMgmtAgent Fabric data agent (e.g., 'how many high-priority admits this month already received outreach?', 'what is the member's care-plan owner?'). Never used to assign outreach itself.

name: ask_siu_agent
description: Delegate a deeper SIU question to the SIUAgent Fabric data agent (e.g., provider pattern history, billed-amount distribution by claim type). Never used to open or close an SIU case.

name: query_fabric_iq
description: Issue an ontology-grounded question to FabricIQPreviewTool. Uses the three PayerRT_Copilot connections (FabricGraph for Payer_Ontology, FabricDataAgentRouter for UM/CareMgmt/SIU routing, FabricSemanticModel for PayerAnalytics measures). Prefer this over the explicit ask_*_agent tools when the operator asks an open-ended cross-persona question; fall back to the explicit tools when the persona is already known. PHI-minimized — never returns raw member or provider identifiers.

scope.description: Which IQ surface(s) to consult. Use 'all' for cross-surface questions.
